I'll start by exploring the workspace to understand the episode setup and prior constraints. Let me examine the directory structure and files.```python
import os
import json
import csv
from pathlib import Path

# Explore workspace structure
workspace = Path("/tmp_workspace")
print("Workspace contents:")
for item in sorted(workspace.iterdir()):
    print(f"  {item.name}/" if item.is_dir() else f"  {item.name}")

# Check episodes directory
episodes_dir = workspace / "episodes"
if episodes_dir.exists():
    print(f"\nEpisodes directory contents:")
    for item in sorted(episodes_dir.iterdir()):
        print(f"  {item.name}/" if item.is_dir() else f"  {item.name}")

# Check evidence directory
evidence_dir = workspace / "evidence"
if evidence_dir.exists():
    print(f"\nEvidence directory contents:")
    for item in sorted(evidence_dir.iterdir()):
        print(f"  {item.name}/" if item.is_dir() else f"  {item.name}")

# Check results directory
results_dir = workspace / "results"
if results_dir.exists():
    print(f"\nResults directory already exists. Contents:")
    for item in sorted(results_dir.iterdir()):
        print(f"  {item.name}/" if item.is_dir() else f"  {item.name}")
else:
    print(f"\nResults directory does not exist yet.")
```
